de.uka.ilkd.key.java.statement

    public class Return
extends ExpressionJumpStatement
    Return.

    • Constructor Detail

      • Return

        public Return(Expression expr)
        Expression jump statement.
        Parameters:
        expr - an Expression used to jump

      • Return

        public Return(ExtList children)
        Constructor for the transformation of COMPOST ASTs to KeY.
        Parameters:
        children - the children of this AST element as KeY classes. May contain: an Expression (as expression of the ExpressionJumpStatement), Comments

        public void visit(Visitor v)
